name: Verisk Analytics
bullCase: Verisk is the FICO of insurance — the essential data and analytics infrastructure for P&C underwriting. After divesting Energy and Financial Services, it is a pure-play insurance analytics monopoly with 92%+ recurring revenue. ISO/AIR catastrophe modeling is non-substitutable for carrier pricing and reinsurance.
bearCase: Verisk's 14x forward PE and 14% EPS growth trajectory are attractive but execution risk exists as the company refocuses post-divestitures. If the P&C insurance market softens significantly, data licensing volumes plateau. Data breach risk for a company holding underwriting data on nearly every US property.

screener.note: Valuation score 1.91 exceeds 0.8 limit (Upgraded from FAIL: Protected by elite quality floor (QCS 9.72))

description: Verisk Analytics, Inc. engages in the provision of data analytics and technology solutions to the insurance industry in the United States and internationally.
